posts.title: Bulk Password Generation for Windows Active Directory: A Complete Automation Guide
posts.desc: Onboard 500 users with 500 unique CSPRNG passwords using PowerShell automation, CSV pipelines, and safe Active Directory handoff — no third-party tools.
posts.author: Alex Chen, IT Security Specialist
posts.excerpt: Onboard 500 users with 500 unique CSPRNG passwords using PowerShell automation, CSV pipelines, and safe Active Directory handoff — no third-party tools.

posts.title: PowerShell Scripts for Secure Bulk Password Generation
posts.desc: Five production-ready PowerShell scripts: CSPRNG generation, AD import, mandatory-change flagging, encrypted CSV export, and audit logging.
posts.author: Alex Chen, IT Security Specialist
posts.excerpt: Five production-ready PowerShell scripts: CSPRNG generation, AD import, mandatory-change flagging, encrypted CSV export, and audit logging.

posts.title: NIST SP 800-63B 2025: What IT Admins Actually Need to Change
posts.desc: NIST July 2025 final raises the minimum to 15 characters and formally prohibits mandatory rotation. Group Policy updates, breach corpus checking, and helpdesk changes covered.
posts.author: Alex Chen, IT Security Specialist
posts.excerpt: NIST July 2025 final raises the minimum to 15 characters and formally prohibits mandatory rotation. Group Policy updates, breach corpus checking, and helpdesk changes covered.

posts.title: CSV Password Pipelines: From Bulk Generation to IAM Import
posts.desc: Column schemas for Active Directory, Azure AD, and Okta. Secure file handling and the mandatory-change-at-logon flag explained.
posts.author: Alex Chen, IT Security Specialist
posts.excerpt: Column schemas for Active Directory, Azure AD, and Okta. Secure file handling and the mandatory-change-at-logon flag explained.

posts.title: Password Reset at Scale: Automating Enterprise Credential Rotation
posts.desc: Rotating credentials for 2,000 accounts after a breach. The full process, tooling, and user communication template for a controlled enterprise reset.
posts.author: Alex Chen, IT Security Specialist
posts.excerpt: Rotating credentials for 2,000 accounts after a breach. The full process, tooling, and user communication template for a controlled enterprise reset.

posts.title: Entropy Explained: Why Password Length Beats Complexity Rules
posts.desc: A 16-character lowercase password has more entropy than an 8-character mixed password. The maths, and why NIST dropped composition rules.
posts.author: Alex Chen, IT Security Specialist
posts.excerpt: A 16-character lowercase password has more entropy than an 8-character mixed password. The maths, and why NIST dropped composition rules.
